cells.approximation: If the selected MILP branch is locally unique and the resulting parametric LP is strongly regular, its value is differentiable at the population table. The stratified multinomial CLT and delta method then give the reported Gaussian deployment probability. This is a preregistered approximation, not a finite-sample coverage guarantee.
cells.derivation: If ||p_hat-p||_1<=r in every stratum, each radius-epsilon ball around p_hat lies inside the radius-(epsilon+r) ball around p. Feasibility of the population-centered enlarged problem therefore forces the adaptive optimizer to deploy. Weissman plus a stratum union bound controls the complement.

name: MOSAIC preregistered abstention theory curve v1
scope: Outcome-free finite-sample abstention envelope and local active-set delta-method power curve computed from locked population laws.
